message:
fix(gui): add render metrics tracking and fix intensity-aware bold detection

render/mod.rs: add RenderMetrics struct tracking cells_rendered,
glyphs_resolved, and cache_hits per frame. Wire into paint_opengl
and expose via render_metrics_snapshot(). Add test for metric counting.

render/pane.rs: pass intensity parameter to resolve_fg_color_attr
calls so bold text correctly uses the bright palette color.

render/screen_line.rs: same intensity parameter fix for per-cell
foreground color resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
